description: Before publication, an editor must check a freelance submission to ensure it is original work and does not contain plagiarism.

nodes.task_description: Copy the text of the submitted article.

expected_outcome.value: The text is ready to be checked.

nodes.task_description: Run the text through a plagiarism detection tool.

expected_outcome.value: The tool scans the web and internal archives for matching text.

nodes.task_description: Review the plagiarism report and investigate any flagged passages to determine if they are properly attributed or constitute plagiarism.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes a final determination on the originality of the work.
